back_translation: After these events, the word of the LORD came to Abram in a vision, saying, "Do not be afraid, Abram. I am your shield, and your reward will be very great."
Abram said, "O Lord GOD, what will You give me? I have no children, and the heir of my household is Eliezer of Damascus."
Abram continued, "Behold, You have not given me offspring, and a servant in my household will be my heir."
Then the word of the LORD came to Abram, saying, "This one will not be your heir, but one who comes from your own body will be your heir."
He brought Abram outside and said, "Look up to the sky and count the stars, if you can." He said to him, "So shall your offspring be."
Abram believed in the LORD, and He credited it to him as righteousness.
He said to him, "I am the LORD, who brought you out of Ur of the Chaldeans to give you this land as a possession."
Abram replied, "O Lord GOD, how shall I know that I will possess it?"
He said to him, "Bring me a three-year-old heifer, a three-year-old goat, a three-year-old ram, a turtledove, and a young pigeon."
Abram brought all these animals to Him, cut them in two, and laid each half opposite the other. But the birds he did not cut.
Birds of prey descended on the carcasses, but Abram drove them away.
As the sun was setting, Abram fell into a deep sleep, and great fear and darkness fell upon him.
He said to Abram, "Know for certain that your descendants will be foreigners in a land that is not theirs. They will be enslaved and oppressed for 400 years.
I will judge the nation that enslaves them, and afterward they will come out with great wealth.
As for you, you will go to your fathers in peace and be buried at a good old age.
In the fourth generation, your descendants will return here, because the iniquity of the Amorites is not yet complete."
When the sun had set and darkness had come, behold, a smoking firepot and a flaming torch appeared and passed between the halves of the cut carcasses.
On that day, the LORD established a covenant with Abram, saying, "I will give this land to your offspring, from the river of Egypt to the great river, the Euphrates,
the land of the Kenites, the Kenizzites, the Kadmonites,
the Hittites, the Perizzites, the Rephaim,
the Amorites, the Canaanites, the Girgashites, and the Jebusites."
